cars.title: 2010 Suzuki Swift GLX 5dr Hatch
cars.reason: Low km for year, Japanese build quality, genuinely fun to drive. Swifts hold their value well. Best value proposition here.
cars.description: White Suzuki Swift GLX 5 door hatch. Full service history. 1.5L engine is peppy and economical. Rego until October 2026. New tyres all round at 135k. Bluetooth stereo. Reluctantly selling as I need something bigger for family. No mechanical issues. Always garaged.

cars.title: 2011 Toyota Yaris YRS 3dr Hatch
cars.reason: Best-in-class reliability. Auto transmission, under 160k kms, 2011 model all for under $4k. These are the benchmark for cheap used cars.
cars.description: Red Toyota Yaris 3 door hatch. 1.3L VVT-i engine. Automatic. Power steering. Air conditioning ice cold. Rego until December 2026. Genuine 155k kms with logbook service history. Always serviced at Toyota dealer until 130k. Impeccable condition inside and out. Only selling because moving to NZ.

cars.title: 2009 Mazda 2 Neo 5dr Hatch
cars.reason: Reliable Japanese hatch, cheap to run, great first car. Manuals are getting harder to find.
cars.description: Mazda2 in good condition. Rego until August 2026. Recently serviced. No mechanical issues. Clean interior. Small dent on rear bumper but doesn't affect driving. Cold A/C. Great fuel economy around 6L/100km.

cars.title: 2006 Honda Civic VTi-S 5dr Hatch
cars.reason: Sporty Civic with the famous Honda VTEC engine. Great handling, fun to drive, bulletproof reliability.
cars.description: Silver Honda Civic VTi-S hatchback. 1.8L i-VTEC engine. Very fun to drive. Recent clutch replacement at 180k. New front tyres. Rego until July 2026. Minor hail damage on bonnet. Interior is immaculate. No leaks, no smoke, starts first time every time.

cars.title: 2008 Hyundai Getz 1.4L 3dr Hatch
cars.reason: Cheap as chips. Getz are tough little cars, cheap to insure and run. Under $3k is a steal.
cars.description: Blue Hyundai Getz. Manual transmission. Reliable daily driver. 1.4L engine. New battery. Clean interior. Paint is a bit faded on roof. No rego but comes with new 3 months rego included in price. Perfect budget car.

cars.title: 2004 Toyota Corolla Ascent Sedan
cars.reason: Toyota reliability, auto trans, parts are everywhere. High kms but Corollas run forever with basic maintenance.
cars.description: Old faithful. 1.8L engine, auto, power steering, power windows. Good tyres. Has a few scratches and paint fade on roof but mechanically solid. Just had timing belt and water pump done at 210k. Serving me well but upgrading.

cars.title: 2006 Volkswagen Golf 2.0 FSI Comfortline
cars.reason: German build quality, nice interior, great handling. Higher maintenance cost than Japanese cars but a nicer drive.
cars.description: Silver VW Golf Mk5. 2.0L FSI engine. Manual transmission. Sunroof. Climate control. Cruise control. Leather steering wheel. Has service history. Just had timing belt done at 170k. Minor issues: passenger window switch intermittent, slight wear on driver bolster.

cars.title: 2009 Holden Commodore VE Omega Sedan
cars.reason: Lots of car for $3.5k. V6 power, huge boot, comfortable highway car. Parts everywhere. Fuel economy is average (12-14L/100km).
cars.description: Black VE Commodore Omega. 3.6L V6. Automatic. Big car, very comfortable. Bluetooth, cruise control. Tow bar. Aftermarket stereo. Rego until August 2026. Has some electrical gremlins (window on passenger side slow). Overall good condition for its age.

cars.title: 2005 Subaru Forester 2.5X AWD Wagon
cars.reason: AWD wagon with heaps of space. Good for camping/moving gear. Known head gasket risk at this age though. Check service history carefully.
cars.description: Green Subaru Forester. All wheel drive. Roof racks included. Space for days with seats down. Has service history up to 220k. Head gaskets done at 180k. New rear brakes. Some rust bubbles on rear wheel arches. Good condition overall for age.

cars.title: 2003 Mitsubishi Lancer ES Sedan
cars.reason: Absolute budget option. Rock bottom price. If you need a car for under $2k and it runs, this is it. Check for rust.
cars.description: Silver Mitsubishi Lancer. Reliable 1.8L engine. Manual. Power steering. Central locking. Recent oil change and new spark plugs. A bit rough cosmetically - faded paint, ripped driver seat. But it drives fine. 3 months rego. Good first car on a tight budget.

cars.title: 2007 Ford Falcon BF MkII XT Sedan
cars.reason: Aussie icon, parts everywhere, comfortable highway cruiser. High kms but the Barra 6 is legendary. Expect 15L/100km.
cars.description: Silver BF Falcon. 4.0L straight six (Barra engine). Very comfortable cruiser. Runs well. Has tow bar. CD player. Power windows. A few dings and scratches. Interior is tidy. Aircon works. 12 months rego. Just need it gone, moving overseas.

cars.title: 2007 Mazda BT-50 2.5L Dual Cab 4x2 Ute
cars.reason: Diesel ute with a tray, practical as. High kms but the 2.5 diesel is known to go 400k+. Check for clutch condition and rust in tray.
cars.description: White Mazda BT-50 dual cab ute. Diesel turbo. Tray with drop-in liner. Great work ute. High kms but service history available. New injectors at 270k. Clutch a bit heavy but still good. Some rust in the tray corners. 6 months rego. Great for tradies or as a farm/weekend runabout.
